calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-06-2015 Off Calendar

Notice Of Prove Up Hearing For Default Judgment Request
Off Calendar Sep-15-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Charles Crompton, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos and Alvin Mok, CSR: Proceedings reported by: Sonia Wong, CSR#11288.

Tiffany Day, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, DESOTO CAB COMPANY, INC.
No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) MARIA LIVINGSTONE.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.
Corey Lamb sworn and examinded on behalf of Plaintiff.
After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows:

Damages: $3,161.49
Pre-Judgment Interest: $0.00
Attorney's Fees: $0.00
Costs: $550.00
Total Judgment in the amount of $3,711.49
Judgment signed in open court.
